title: spec_driven_rescope_v1
description: spec_driven_v2 retrieval.rescope output. queries = re-planned search queries for one slot whose first-pass search was entirely off-target. query_text = compact English regulatory noun phrase (BM25 lexical anchors). Each query carries scope channels, each with a {boost|filter} mode: collection (corpus document family), status (regulatory currency — RG/SRP/DSRS only), design (NuScale design family — nuscale_* only), canonical_id (normalized document id for exact targeting). status applies ONLY to regulatory collections and design ONLY to NuScale collections — mutually exclusive (the code drops a channel set on the wrong collection). Re-scoping MAY switch collection / flip boost<->filter relative to the initial scope.

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentence rationale written *before* building the queries: how the diagnosis (why_not_needed / what_is_needed) changes the scope relative to the initial scope. Guided decoding decodes this first (leading CoT).

collection_mode.description: How to apply collection: 'boost' = additive in-scope boost, excludes nothing (recall-safe, default); 'filter' = hard-restrict the search population to that collection. Switch decisively from the initial collection when the diagnosis pins a different family.

status.description: Regulatory currency. ONLY for RG/SRP/DSRS collections (10CFR/FR and NuScale documents have no status — leave null). Default 'current' unless the diagnosis asks for history/draft/withdrawn.

design.description: NuScale design family. ONLY for nuscale_* collections (regulatory documents have no design — leave null). US600 = certified DCA baseline (~50 MWe/module); US460 = later SDAA (~77 MWe/module); PreApp = pre-application. Default 'US600' unless the diagnosis names US460 / the SDAA / Docket 05200050 / pre-application material.

design_mode.description: How to apply design: 'boost' (default, additive) or 'filter'.

canonical_id.description: Normalized document id for version/section targeting. NRC_MANUAL forms: RG-{division}.{num}, SRP-{ch}.{sec}, DSRS-{sec}, 10CFR-Part{N} for a single 10 CFR Part (10 CFR 50.46 -> 10CFR-Part50, GDC -> 10CFR-Part50; do NOT emit 10CFR-Part1-50). NuScale FSAR forms (nuscale_FSAR only): FSAR-Part02-Ch{N} for a Tier-2 chapter 1-21 (ECCS->Ch06, accident analysis->Ch15), or FSAR-Part{01,07,08,09,10}. Revision NOT included. Do NOT invent one for title-keyword documents. null when not confidently mappable. The code re-validates and drops on failure.

canonical_id_mode.description: How to apply canonical_id: 'boost' (default) or 'filter' (hard-restrict to that exact document grouping).
